sql.if: AND ( u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{criteria.keyword}, '%') OR u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{criteria.keyword}, '%') OR ac.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{criteria.keyword}, '%') OR ac.job_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{criteria.keyword}, '%') )
AND cr.admin_memo IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(cr.admin_memo) <> ''

mapper.select:
SELECT cr.id, cr.user_id, u.email AS user_email, u.name AS user_name, cr.application_case_id, ac.company_name, ac.job_title, cr.correction_type, cr.source_type, cr.status, aul.model, aul.token_usage AS total_tokens, aul.credit_used, CASE WHEN cr.admin_memo IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(cr.admin_memo) <> '' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS has_memo, cr.created_at FROM correction_request cr JOIN users u ON u.id = cr.user_id LEFT JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = cr.application_case_id LEFT JOIN ai_usage_log aul ON aul.id = cr.ai_usage_log_id WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY cr.id DESC LIMIT #{criteria.size} OFFSET #{criteria.offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM correction_request cr JOIN users u ON u.id = cr.user_id LEFT JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = cr.application_case_id WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM correction_request) AS total_requests, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM correction_request WHERE status = 'SUCCESS') AS success_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_usage_log WHERE status = 'FAILED' AND feature_type IN ( 'CORRECTION_SELF_INTRO', 'CORRECTION_INTERVIEW_ANSWER', 'CORRECTION_RESUME', 'CORRECTION_PORTFOLIO' )) AS failure_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM correction_request WHERE admin_memo IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(admin_memo) <> '') AS memo_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM correction_request WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE) AS today_count

SELECT cr.id, cr.user_id, u.email AS user_email, u.name AS user_name, cr.application_case_id, ac.company_name, ac.job_title, cr.correction_type, cr.source_type, cr.source_ref_id, cr.original_text, cr.improved_text, cr.result_json, cr.status, cr.ai_usage_log_id, aul.model, aul.input_tokens, aul.output_tokens, aul.token_usage AS total_tokens, aul.credit_used, cr.admin_memo, cr.created_at FROM correction_request cr JOIN users u ON u.id = cr.user_id LEFT JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = cr.application_case_id LEFT JOIN ai_usage_log aul ON aul.id = cr.ai_usage_log_id WHERE cr.id = #{id}

SELECT aul.id, aul.user_id, u.email AS user_email, u.name AS user_name, aul.application_case_id, ac.company_name, ac.job_title, aul.feature_type, aul.model, aul.input_tokens, aul.output_tokens, aul.token_usage AS total_tokens, aul.error_message, aul.created_at FROM ai_usage_log aul JOIN users u ON u.id = aul.user_id LEFT JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = aul.application_case_id WHERE aul.status = 'FAILED' AND aul.feature_type IN ( 'CORRECTION_SELF_INTRO', 'CORRECTION_INTERVIEW_ANSWER', 'CORRECTION_RESUME', 'CORRECTION_PORTFOLIO' ) ORDER BY aul.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
